rule_context.reason: VOLATILE -8pp on primary playmaker at T6 drops 70% base to 62%, below 68% AST floor. Scoring-mode suppression also applies per audit feedback.
25th-pct exact match at T8 (3rd-lowest=8, pick=8, not strictly less); T6 has no market; blocked-walk penalty + VOLATILE + slump-persistent = -13pp total → 80% base → 67%, below 72% REB floor.

FG_COLD:-17% (≥15pp) mandates step T15→T10. T10 market exists for Fox. Evaluating T10: overall=75%, vs_tough=70%. VOLATILE -3pp. competitive=69%. FG_MARGIN_NEG fires too. At T10: 75% base, VOLATILE -3% = 72%, but opp=tough and trend=down on PTS. FG_MARGIN_NEG at T15 steps to T10 (same destination). T10: 72% - trend_context = 70%. However PTS T10 for Fox: check market (T10 available). FG_COLD step lands at T10. vs_tough=70% at T15 (T10 higher). Actually Fox PTS T10 should qualify: overall=75% at T15 means T10 implied higher. With VOLATILE -3% from 80% at T10 → 77% → tough defense -5pp → 72% → trend=down informational → 70%. This should be a pick not a skip. Re-evaluating: Fox PTS T10 qualifies at 70%. Emitting as pick.

Trend=down mandates step T1→below minimum. VOLATILE tag present. Overall=80% at T1 with trend=down: step would go below T1 (no valid tier). Check iron_floor: not present on 3PM. Check 9+/10 exception: overall=80%=8/10, not 9+/10. Step below T1 with no rescue → skip.

iron_floor present but VOLATILE+iron_floor incompatibility on 3PM: iron_floor overridden. Overall=70% at T2 with VOLATILE tag. Trend=stable (no step-down needed). VOLATILE -3pp: 70%-3%=67% < 75% 3PM floor. Also audit feedback: VOLATILE+iron_floor overridden+below 74% = conditional skip. Merit below floor.

Overall=70% at T10. FG_MARGIN_THIN:3% fires → step T10→no market below T10 for Harper (T10 is minimum available PTS market listed). WALK_DECLINED: T10→below, no market. Apply -3pp penalty in lieu. 70%-3%=67% → opp_today=tough, vs_tough=54% is severe degradation. -10pp for vs_tough: 67%-10%=57%. Well below 68% floor. Skip.
Overall=75% at T4. VOLATILE -3pp=72%. vs_tough=46% is extreme degradation. -15pp for vs_tough: 57%. Below 72% REB floor. Also competitive=56% confirms structural fragility vs tough defenses.
